objects.text: Text.Results-driven Business Analyst with more than 5 years of experience analyzing business processes, identifying improvement opportunities, and delivering actionable insights for strategic decision-making. Skilled in data analysis, requirements gathering, and project management.

• Data Analysis
• Requirements Gathering
• Process Improvement
• Project Management
• Stakeholder Communication

• Certified Business Analysis Professional
• Agile Certified Practitioner

• Languages: Fluent in Spanish and English
• Volunteer Experience: Mentoring program coordinator at Borcelle Community Center.

• Conducted comprehensive data analysis to identify trends and opportunities for cost savings, resulting in a 15% increase in operational efficiency.
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to gather and document business requirements for software development projects.
• Facilitated workshops with stakeholders to prioritize feature development and resolve conflicts, ensuring alignment with business objectives.

Led a team in conducting a market analysis to identify growth opportunities in the healthcare sector.
Analyzed competitor strategies and market trends to recommend strategic initiatives for business expansion.
